lines.text: They say you're a good shot. Hope you don't mind that I'm better.
I know more than anyone that a head that big is an easy target.
Why the hell'd you give B.O.B. all that firepower?!
He doesn't waste it.
He does good work, doesn't he?
That he does.
I've heard stories about you, Captain Amari... but none of them mentioned how beautiful you are.
How cute. Your aim had better outdo your flattery, young man.
Aren't you a relic? A Siege Automaton E54... your kind left a grave wound on this world.
hesitant beeps
Come to think of it, I suppose we aren't so different.
You know, I haven't had any real competition at the range lately.
There are plenty of moving targets on the battlefield.
I'll... take that as a no.
You always bring out the best in me.
Oh, enough!
Fighting battles at such a young age... I hope you remember to take time for yourself.
Sometimes. But I have so much to do.
sigh That's always the excuse.
You were truly fearsome in your prime.
I wanted respect, not fear.
Even past your prime, you are more lethal than ever.
Some people improve with age. Others... never quite learn to keep their mouths shut.
I never asked my father his opinion of me. Now, he is beyond my reach.
I'm sure he was proud, even if he never said it.
How would you know?
Trust me. I know.
I know that look. Mending an old wound?
I wronged someone dear to me. The path to redemption is... trying.
It's not pleasant. But you'll see it was worth it in the end.
I hope so.
I studied you in school. They said you were the best sniper in the world.
I'm sure some would disagree.
Like the sniper who shot out your eye?
scoffs She doesn't count.
Have I seen you before?
It's possible. I've passed through Junkertown once or twice.
You're the one who kicked Red Ned in the wicker basket!
He started it.
It's so hard to tell right from wrong. If only I had someone to... give me guidance.
Mm hmm.
Someone wise, and experienced! An adoptive mother, if you will.
Oh, no. Absolutely not.
You remind me of myself when I was younger.
That a compliment?
You be the judge.
Okay... Thanks for the compliment.
Does it bother you that you've taken as many lives as you've saved?
I don't mind killing monsters. But go on, keep pushing me.
Yet another stretch of cloudless skies and idyllic ocean views. Wonderful.
sigh Of course you would hate the beach.
Have you heard the reports? A masked vigilante has been running rampant in Cairo.
Well, let's hope they're swiftly dealt with.
So you're going with Cole... joining Overwatch.
Isn't that what you want?
What I want never should have mattered to begin with.
You're still hiding. When are you coming back for good?
I'm trying, Fareeha. Please, be patient with me.
I've been patient for years. What's a little while longer?
Thank you, mother...
You're welcome, Fareeha...
Tell Jack to stop chasing me.
I have. He wouldn't listen.
Isn't that just like him?
I didn't need your help.
I know the old Gabriel is grateful.
Oh, Gibraltar... where has the time gone?
Do you remember that night? Dancing in the command center until dawn?
We were foolish, weren't we?
Perhaps we still are.
Stay out of trouble, Nana.
As long as you get into plenty.
Haha! Yes, ma'am.
The older I get, the faster the years go.
It's likely that time is passing at the same rate it always has. chuckle Barring relativistic effects, of course.
I liked you better when you were talking to yourself.
I'm a little surprised we both went the vigilante route.
What can I say? We've got good sense.
Remember the Vikosky kingpins? Three hundred meters downrange. You fired once, they both fell. Beautiful.
sigh That's not the word I would choose.
You can't take Talon down by yourself, Jack.
Maybe not. But then, I've always liked being the underdog.
You need to stop, Jack. This crusade is getting out of hand.
How many times have you told me that?
How many times have I been wrong?
You always have my back.
Keep doing that, and I always will.
A peaceful reality is within our reach.
I wish I could believe that...
Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table?
No thank you.
Not a conventional combination.
...But intimidating, nonetheless.
So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: what is your favorite animal?
Oh, the orchid mantis! Especially the pink ones!
Uh... yeah, I can see it!
I'm quite surprised that you can get back up without my help.
Hey, one less person for you to keep an eye on, right?
I wouldn't go that far.
Saw you training with your brother the other night. You two make a real good team!
Thanks. He's always teaching me new tricks, too.
I bet! You're lucky you've got each other.
sigh We really are.
You're keeping up with the team better than I expected. Maybe I should push you harder.
Sure. Whatever bar you set for me, I'll hit it.
Careful, now. Is that overconfidence I hear?
Nope. Just determination.
You know, my twin was always sticking her neck out for me.
I get that. Nothing beats helping your loved ones.
If she hadn't let me return the favor, I'd miss out on knowing that feeling. Just some food for thought.
Huh... I'd never thought of it that way.
Hey, sis. Don't get in my way out there.
Are you ever gonna let that go?
Maybe... if you do my laundry for the rest of the year?
Not happening.
Even after everything, I still made it to the front lines. Think I made mom and dad happy?
Are they ever happy?
Ah... good point.
I wasn't expecting to be thrown into the thick of it so soon after joining Overwatch.
Yeah... I was hoping we'd have a... little more down-time.
Well, we'll get through it. Taking breaks is overrated, anyway.
sigh To you, maybe...
You gotta be more careful out there.
What, and make your job easier? Hah, never.
Ugh, for real? You've sprained your knee, like, a thousand times! Shifu would say to cherish your body.
You're such a worrywart. I can handle it.
Thanks for convincing mom and dad to let me take a break from school. It probably wasn't easy.
Eh, wasn't that bad. I told them you'd do a Masters when you got back.
Grea-- oh, what?
A wanted man on the run. I've known a few of you.
I'm only guilty of stealing hearts.
chuckle Guess it's a good thing I'm heartless.
Real glory comes from helping people, not hurting them.
We may have... different definitions.
How's Bars doin'? Surprised she didn't take my head off last time I stopped by.
She's not goin' to miss if you come 'round again.
Wouldn't exactly say it's nice to see you again.
Bite me.
I'd rather bite the dust.
Good. I'll kick some up for you.
Stone Anthony says you still owe him five hundred dollars for that weekend in Tucson.
He's welcome to come collect.
Seems to think you're going to shoot him dead if he does.
Must not want it that bad, then.
Good thing your brains aren't made of dynamite.
Yeah? Why's that?
Wouldn't be enough up there to blow your nose.
You seem a little stuffy yourself.
Your parents ever pester you about goin' back to the family business?
They are supportive of my work, now that they have seen what I've become.
How sweet of them.
I can't believe we lost such valuable cargo. You would've fetched a fine sum.
My condolences for your loss.
Considering that you have to deal with Cole, I'd say it's really your loss.
You know, I saved Cole's life once.
Am I supposed to be thankful for that?
You headed home after this, Haz?
Aye. Thought I'd bring Susie by the memorial.
You're more sentimental than I thought.
Aren't all us criminals softer than we say so?
Lovin' the bleached look. You do that yourself?
Sweet of you to say so darlin', but it's natural.
Right, well... looks class!
That is a mighty fine rifle. Mind if I give it a whirl?
You don't seem like the type to give it back.
gasp Come on now... I'm a woman of my word.
Your actions speak louder.
We hunt foxes where I come from.
Hm. Where I'm from, the foxes fight back.
I hear, if it weren't for your parents, you'd be as much an outlaw as me.
They're always trying to help, but frankly, I'd prefer they gave up.
Yeah? Well, be careful what you wish for.
So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal?
I'm partial to scorpions.
Uh... yeah. I can see it.
Wanna see me throw B.O.B. like a basketball?
Hands off! He ain't your toy.
...Yet.
I hear the fishing's great where you're from.
Our fish might be a little big for you.
There's nothing I can't catch with determination and a little dynamite.
Aggression is no substitute for ability.
Reckon that's true. Good thing I have both.
I better not see your face in my neck of the woods.
Are you afraid I'll free your servant?
Lay one finger on Bob and I'll show you what fear means.
Can't imagine what kind of bounty they'd put on your head.
I'm afraid I don't pay much attention to humanity's laws.
Look at that. We've got something in common.
Stay behind me! I will keep you safe!
Thanks, but I already have a bodyguard.
That's a lot of armor. Though I guess you are a pretty big target.
Aha! I guess I am!
You're too good with that gun to waste it on a life of crime.
I'll go on the straight and narrow when hell freezes over.
Or when the law catches up with you.
chuckle Same thing.
I was just in the kitchen. Anyone have something they wanna confess?
I ain't a snitch, but let's just say those corndogs are gone for good.
tired sigh
Your company likes makin' headlines.
Yes. A natural byproduct of repairing a chaotic world.
Hmpfh, seems more like a tactic to line their pockets... but what do I know?
You need a dose of reality, little miss sunshine.
It doesn't hurt to look on the bright side.
Till the sun gets in your eyes.
Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table?
Can't say I do.
Have you all seen what this guy can do?
bashful beeps
I'm surprised you're sticking around.
Was going to leave, but I reckon you'd miss me too much.
True, nobody does "second most handsome man on the team" better than you.
Line them up.
...Knock 'em down!
Hey! Who took my Nano Cola?
That stuff's no good for you. Have some water instead.
You just wanted to drink it yourself!
Ah... maybe.
I grow tired of chasing you.
You're tired?! Imagine me.
It's none of my business, but I like fighting for something I believe in. Not too late for you to do the same.
Huh... I think you're right.
I am?
Yes. It is none of your business.
If you die, can I have your bow?
No. I will snap it in half with my final breath.
Aw...
Always looking sharp, brother.
My arrows will never dull, as long as my will stands strong.
I meant your hair, but nice to know.
You're the one who's gonna make me live forever, yeah?
Uh... are you talking about my Immortality Field? That's... not what it does.
Name doesn't really work then. You might wanna fix that.
I feel sorry for your doctor.
She's the best in the outback! Cured me of my pie woe mania.
I think you mean... pyromania?
...That one I'm still seeing her for!
What's wrong, man?
It's nothing. Just beginning to think nobody likes me.
Maybe if you stopped stealing and blowing up everybody's stuff?
Is it even worth it, if I don't get to do what I love?
I wanted to go to the beach earlier, but some maniac stole all the volleyball nets.
nervous chuckle Why would someone do that? Unless they had a brilliant plan...
Ready to heal some wounds?
Physical or emotional?
If you can handle both, go for it.
I've got reservations at a fantastic restaurant, but... I'm not too sure who to invite.
I know a guy.
Is he, by any chance, a dashing ex-mercenary from the Carribean?
chuckling He might just be!
So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal?
Hmm... tiger shark. The best kind of shark.
Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Why'd you have to go and grow a conscience?
Huh. After all we've seen, how could you not?
I got a short memory. Except for when I'm owed.
I'm done with Talon. Nothing can make me change my mind. Not even you.
Saves me time. Dragging you back is faster!
Must you be so relaxed? We depend on you!
I'm not relaxed, I just make everything look easy.
Angela, I met someone the other day who I think is just your type. Handsome, kind, several doctorates...
laughs I'm afraid there's someone else I have my eye on.
Oh? Anyone I know?
Well, with any luck, you'll find out soon enough.
Healing and hurting... hm. I guess we're not that different.
Hmph. I assure you, we are nothing alike.
Just to warn you, I don't have a lot of experience healing people who fly.
Just hit me in midair. How hard could it be?
Your heart is pounding, traitor. Are you scared?
Has anyone ever told you that you're kind of a creep?
You know what they say: seasons don't fear the...
Don't. Just don't.
It might be a tall order, but want to try taking fewer hits this time?
Complaining, already? This is what you're paid for!
laugh I'm getting paid?
Where did a medic like you learn to handle a weapon like that?
The number of battlefields I've seen, I was bound to pick something up.
I hate it here.
...Then you can hate it anywhere!
You're strong enough to leave Talon. They can't trap you!
But I am not trapped! My colleagues give me everything I need!
I thought the same thing for too long.
It feels like Talon has gone from covert ops to world domination overnight.
They've done plenty of raids in the past, but nothing nearly this... loud.
Huh. You have experience fighting Talon?
Yeah. You could say that.
That's some tech.
Yours isn't half-bad, either!
You're with Overwatch now? I thought you didn't do commitment.
You know I'm full of surprises.
Qué dulce. Could you "surprise" them by planting a few bugs for me?
Even for you, sweetheart... I have to pass.
I wish we could get that Immortality Field to work on my turret.
But then our enemies would have no chance!
I got some new prototypes that need testing. Thought of you.
Me?
Need someone who knows what they're doing.
I'm flattered, and honored.
Am I glad to have you on our side and not Talon's!
Glad to be here. Still not used to such good company.
You fit right in!
chuckle Not so sure about that, but I try.
Brave of you to show your face after what happened in Monte Cristi.
Well, it is a pretty good face.
Look, I promise I won't spill any of Talon's secrets.
Do you know what happened to the last man I trusted?
You know what, that's fine. Keep chasing me.
(French) I am surrounded, as usual, by moronic men. sigh
Careful! You never know who speaks French.
Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table?
I'm guessing... no.
Your muscles look pretty, but lack strength.
Ohhh... You think my muscles are pretty?
Pretty weak.
Whoa, that gun must do a ton of DPS!
proud beeps
We should get Ganymede to scout for us!
worried beeps
Don't worry! No one will touch a feather on Gany's head while Hana Song is here!
relieved beeps
sad beeps
comforting beeps
grateful beeps
Any time, my friend. Any time.
I fought a bunch of you Bastions once. You all had wheels and big sharp teeth.
confused beeping
On second thought, that might have been a dream I had...
understanding beeping
Alright, let's hear that fighting spirit!
spirited beeps
That is exactly what I'm talking about! Woo!
Did you know you have a locked storage drive?
inquisitive beeps
whistle Good encryption. You should be proud.
proud beeps
For the last time, tell Ganymede my beard is not a nest!
disappointed beeps
Don't you "beep boop" me. No is no!
Remind me to install a firewall system in you. Can't be too careful nowadays.
happy beeps
cheers, love beeps
That... sounds awfully familiar.
You're lucky you're a robot.
confused beeps
That was not an invitation to talk to me.
My dad says a lot of your missions were disasters.
Well, if he'd made me the robo-horse I asked for, maybe I would have stood a better chance.
I should introduce you to Dae-hyun! He takes care of my mech when I'm back home.
If that's true, he must have lots of experience.
Yeah, he... Hey!
sigh I can't believe I have to work with criminals.
A great leader adapts to their team, not the other way around.
Why did the chicken cross the road?
Why?
Because to stagnate is to die. Never forget that.
If you don't mind me asking, what is your armor made of?
Your father has my blueprints. Why don't you see for yourself? I'd hate to spoil the surprise.
I still feel that final blow from yesterday's training.
Aw, come on. I didn't hit you that hard.
If that is the case, our enemies have much to fear.
Perhaps today, the dragon will be sated.
That was so artistic! Are you a poet too?
I was, once. Now I seek peace in other ways.
Still sounds pretty poetic to me.
"Sky shining orange"... What rhymes with orange?
Uh... chuckle Sky's more of a blue, in'it?
sigh You aren't a poet, are you?
If I was, I wouldnae know it.
I've been thinking about getting another striped cat, but I'm running out of cool names...
I've named my llama Chuño, like the freeze-dried potato.
Potato... You're a genius! I'll call him Hasselback!
So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal?
Ooh! Siberian tiger!
Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Angela! It's so strange to see you in your armor!
I could say the same for you!
There's no easy way to say this: I read your poetry folder.
What? I... you had no right!
Don't yell at me. We're both victims here.
Papa, don't the Martins live here?
No, they mostly hang out in that Arcology of theirs.
Are they still having problems with curious whales?
Yes, and they still won't let me help!
So, what have you been up to? Seeing anyone?
Oh my gosh, Lena!
Sooo... that's a no?
I'll... tell you later.
I still can't believe how tall you've gotten!
And now, I can lift you with one arm!
You'll have to catch me first! laugh
Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table?
Na!
chuckles
Think I owe you a round, ma'am. Those names you gave me have turned out to be mighty fine recruits.
They were useless in my hands. You're the one who made something of them.
Heard the news about Frankie. She 'n Bez finally got hitched?
Hm.
Glad to hear they're gettin' on well. That goes for all of you.
And we're all tickled pink to hear it.
You remind me of myself when I was younger.
Uh, I'm way cooler than you!
That's exactly what I would've said! All you're missin' is the hat and cigar.
I think I can pull off a cowboy hat.
Want me to buy you one?
No need. I'll just borrow yours.
Was a little jealous of you back in the day, you know. Always made everything look so easy.
That's funny. I felt the same about you.
chuckles I don't buy that for a minute.
Coming from the black-ops cowboy? Yeah, right.
You ain't the only one who tried bounty huntin' when Overwatch fell through.
Hm. You gave up quick.
Well, I realized that huntin' ain't always helpin'. Reckon you might feel the same, someday.
No one wanted my help. At least this way, I'm useful.
You know, that sake's not half bad... but I prefer a little bite to my liquor.
How predictable. Such an unsophisticated taste.
I appreciate a man with traditional taste in armaments.
Have you ever fired a bow?
No, but you won't catch me with one of those pulse rifles, either.
Where's your lasso, cowboy? Aren't ye gonna hogtie me? Collect the bounty?
Lucky for you, I hung up that hat years ago.
Then why are you still wearin' it?
chuckles Guess I just like the look of it.
Can't you do somethin' about the glare when you get all up in the sky like that?
Turn down the brightness on your flashbang. Then we'll talk.
Still can't believe I get to work with a real cowboy... What's it like in the American West?
Lizards and dirt, far as the eye can see.
Wow! That sounds amazing.
chuckle Beats the city, I'll tell you that.
Must cost a fortune to spill all those bullets.
Good thing I'm not paying for 'em.
Hey Dr. Zhou. Is it gonna rain?
Looks like a 30% chance of precipitation.
So... maybe. sigh The marvels of modern science.
A friend told me that you're gettin' rusty.
You don't have friends.
I hear a lot of folks say "chivalry is dead", but I'm glad to see it's alive 'n well with you, partner.
And look at you, making the old west young again!
chuckles Oh, I think I've seen too many sunsets to call myself young.
Young or old, I'll be proud to chase the next one by your side!
Look at these fresh faces! What do we owe you for bringing them in, Cole?
Don't care to keep a ledger these days. Heh. What do you say we call it settled?
Deal! It's an honor just to fight at their side!
chuckles Couldn't agree more, old timer.
An American cow hand! Has this dimension shifted timescales?
That's right, big man. It's the 1880's all over again.
Remarkable! How far are we from Bonn? I'd like to meet Heinrich Hertz.
Oh! Where has everyone gone?
Don't worry, big man! We took care of 'em.
Interesting choices, Cole. A professional gamer, a Russian powerlifter, two mercenaries...
You like 'em.
chuckle I really do.
Been awful quiet 'round these parts since Null Sector turned tail.
Yeah. But I'm not convinced the fighting's over.
You hopin' the world might still need us, after all?
I'm never hoping for a storm. Doesn't mean I can stop one from rolling in.
I'll never forgive us for what we did in Hanamura.
Those people were criminals.
...So were we.
Every time I need a laugh, I look at your search history.
sigh Let me guess. Last night, around dinner time?
"Cactus spines in butt. How get rid of?"
Was I supposed to leave 'em in there?!
We should catch up sometime soon.
Why? I already know what you've been up to.
...But I don't.
And the problem is?
Don't you ever wanna settle down?
Maybe. Trouble is, I got some itchy feet.
I've got some powder for that!
You sure you won't let me upgrade that arm?
Ah... you know I like it old school.
I heard you were a bounty hunter in the years after Overwatch went down.
Who told you that...?
Did you catch anybody good?
My bills were always paid. I'll leave it at that.
I know my regrets ain't gonna bring him back, but... I am sorry about how things went down with your father.
Don't be. You played your part in his downfall. Better than he could have foreseen.
You parade around like some righteous outlaw, and yet I doubt you could even throw a lasso.
If it meant I'd catch you on the other end, I wager I'd aim it just right.
Your father was a bad man, but he wasn't a tyrant. This ain't what he would've wanted.
If you think my ambitions end at my father's wants, you're more fool than you look.
Wow! Are you, like, a real cowboy? Do you have any cool stories?!
Not sure you're old enough to hear 'em, kid.
I'm... in my twenties.
chuckles Give it a few years.
Anyone wanna hear my favorite joke about the periodic table?
I-I'm still puzzlin' over the last one.
I'd get dizzy always rollin' around like that. Tell me you're always right side up.
The hamster says that unlike you, he does not imitate tumbleweeds.
Hey, now. What's that supposed to mean?!
I hope I'm keeping up okay. You guys really are the best of the best.
Kid, I was halfway to the jailhouse when they picked me up. I'd say you're doin' just fine.
Oh, another one of Marzia's lackeys. Let's hope you're not as dim as the rest.
You're insulting me? In those shoes?
Darling! These cost more than fifty of you.
Guess you can't buy good taste.
I'm quite capable of defending you out there, dear. But... should I?
Wouldn't your "partner" want you to protect her assets?
I expect she'd much prefer I test their resilience.
Another test from Talon? feigned gasp What a surprise....
Oh, how I envy those solar threads in your hair. A pity I had to settle for twenty-four carat.
It is not a fashion statement.
sigh No, I suppose not to someone with such a... practical sense of style.
Why must you be so difficult, Niran? Hand over the prototype, and your bounty disappears.
Quite surprising that someone in your position doesn't recognize a failed negotiation when she sees one...
Oh, how clever! But just because you've called the game doesn't mean I'll stop playing.
Doesn't matter how many "accidents" you cover up. Rio won't stop fighting to keep Vishkar out of our home!
This is your attempt at resistance? Huh, I hardly noticed.
Do keep that little noisemaker away from me. I shan't be seen with such an inferior design.
Uh, I think you mean, "original design"? Maybe you suits forgot who you stole it from?
Aren't you going to ask about my favorite little creature?
Alright, fine. What's your favorite animal?
Oh, well, I find chinchillas absolutely adorable! And they make the softest coats...
sigh Yeah. I can see it...
How 'bout you and I go rob a place together sometime? Maybe the Louvre?
What do you take me for, a petty thief?
Hah, we're both stealing, princess! You just do it from a boardroom.
You ever drop the whole "corporate" act? Let the mask slip?
"Mask?" I haven't the faintest idea what you mean, Malosi.
Hey! I know better than most that appearances can be deceiving...
Perhaps your charms are a farce, but I assure you, mine are not.
They aren't ready for this!
Remember your inside voice, Malosi.
This IS my inside voice!
I've another meeting in Rio de Janeiro, soon. I insist you accompany me.
Oh? Will it require another reconstruction?
No, no, Vaswani, that's all been reassigned. The investors simply find your work, uh... "inspiring", for whatever reason.
You're quite a skilled negotiator, Marzia. I'm impressed.
It takes more than a strong sword arm to succeed in the Colosseo.
Of course. Still rather rugged, though, aren't you?
That, I should hope, is readily apparent.
Do you still perform, Lacroix? I dare say, you'd be captivating on a stage.
Every kill is a performance.
Precisely my point! The public is simply dying to see you at work.
How does one so young become Korea's strongest warrior?
I'm the best. That's all you need to know.
laughs Confidence! Let's hope it's not unfounded.
Who taught you the blade?
The best swordmaster in the world.
tsk Her...
Talon. You are lucky I do not cut you down where you stand.
laugh We would welcome the challenge.
The Shimada could rise again, if you so choose.
There is nothing to that name, but pain.
Pain... and a sleeping dragon. Wake. Him. Up.
You seem lost. Searching for your place in the world?
No, I wouldn't know where to look.
Embrace your inner conflict, and like-minded people will find you.
Ain't easy, is it? Being in charge of killers and madmen?
No. But I welcome the challenge.
We got a lot in common. Shame I'm gonna kill ya someday.
chuckle Indeed.
You are bold to stand against Vishkar on your own.
I'm not alone. The scientific community is on my side!
It would be wise not to count on that for long.
So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal?
Whichever is strongest. (pause) I'm also fond of starlings.
Uh... yeah, I can see it!
The Circuit Royal. A contest of will and technical ingenuity. A dance of beauty... and destruction.
Is everything poetry and philosophy with you?
Everything is, when you pay attention.
You ever worry the Fist is making you rusty?
Hmph. How about a match after this? To address your... concerns.
I have yet to see a report on your latest experiment.
It's making progress.
Our timeline is non-negotiable.
Keep interrupting me. Surely that will expedite things.
This foolish mission is taking time away from my experiments, Akande.
Think of it as... fieldwork.
Efi visited her cousin recently. I will not forgive what Talon turned him into.
Ah, yes. How is Bisi enjoying prison?
Ask... when I lock you up with him.
Has the child reconsidered my offer? She would thrive with Talon's resources.
You stand for everything wrong in this world. Efi will never join you.
If she cannot comprehend the era that awaits us, then perhaps I have no use for her after all.
Your new weapons are impressive, but you lack the strength to wield them.
Efi made me kind. She did not make me weak.
You know the plan.
Leave no one alive.
